evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: production mindset: care for reliability, maintainability, documentation, and operational ownership; engineering rigor
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour dominates: emphasis on reliability, documentation, quality, and operational ownership with no velocity signals.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Internal data infrastructure serving business decisions—low risk with no financial/regulatory framing.
evidence.data_team_maturity: data warehouse modeling; Tableau dashboards; reusable models
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mid: named tools (Snowflake, Tableau) in responsibilities and established reporting practices suggest mid-stage maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and build curated analytical datasets, metric implementations, and semantic models; Refactoring ad-hoc reporting logic into reusable models; applying engineering rigor
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical responsibilities (dimensional modeling, Snowflake, semantic models, Tableau) show hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: stakeholders; self-serve data exploration; business needs; internal analytics
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus is on internal data infrastructure and enabling self-serve analytics for business teams.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design and build; Refactoring; applying engineering rigor; partner with stakeholders
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Mixed: strategic direction in technical domain (designing models, refactoring) with support orientation toward stakeholders.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI or AI-assisted work expected from candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: enhancing data quality practices; care for reliability and maintainability
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and reliability are named as owned responsibilities without explicit testing frameworks.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: production mindset; reliability; maintainability; operational ownership
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Moderate: operational reliability is a concern but not framed as compliance/risk control.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Design and build; Refactoring ad-hoc reporting logic; fostering self-serve capabilities
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of building new models and refactoring existing ones.
